---
title: "Supplementary: ARI vs Clusters"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: lumen
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)
library(patchwork)

analysis_dir <- here("analysis")

source(file.path(analysis_dir, "knitr.R"))
source(file.path(analysis_dir, "theme.R"))
theme_set(theme_paper(base_size = 12))
```

```{r load_data, include=FALSE}
source(file.path(analysis_dir, "data.R"))
```

We only include runs with manual filtering, `n_comp = 50`, `n_neig = 20`, and `n_hvg = 1000`.

```{r filter}
metrics_long_new <- metrics_long_new %>%
  filter(filtering == "manual", n_comp == 50, n_neig == 20, n_hvg == 1000)
```

# ARI v clusters

These curves show ARI as a function of the number of clusters, grouped by method and filtering mode, and faceted by dataset and algorithm.

```{r ari-curves, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}
ari_curves <- metrics_long_new %>%
  group_by(dataset, method, algorithm) %>%
  arrange(n_clusters, .by_group = TRUE)

p_ari_curves <- ggplot(
  ari_curves, aes(x = n_clusters, y = ari, color = method)
) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_path(alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_grid(algorithm ~ dataset, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_color_method(name = "Method") +
  labs(x = "Number of clusters", y = "ARI", color = "Method")

p_ari_curves
```

# Resolution v clusters

```{r resolution-vs-clusters, fig.height=6, fig.width=10}
resolution_map <- metrics_long_new %>%
  group_by(dataset, method, algorithm, resolution) %>%
  summarize(n_clusters = mean(n_clusters, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p_resolution_vs_clusters <- ggplot(
  resolution_map, aes(x = resolution, y = n_clusters, color = method)
) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_grid(algorithm ~ dataset, scales = "free") +
  scale_color_method(name = "Method") +
  labs(x = "Resolution", y = "Number of clusters", color = "Method")

p_resolution_vs_clusters
```

# Patchwork

```{r supp2, fig.height=8.85, fig.width=6.69}
(p_ari_curves / p_resolution_vs_clusters) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") & theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
